titel: In-depth report on the results of international aid – Ukraine.
html: This document provides a detailed account of the activities and results of international aid. It focuses primarily on Ukraine, and to a certain extent, also covers aid to Moldova and Armenia. Based on goals and priorities, the activities and results are presented within five areas: rebuilding Ukrainian society, societal reforms, security and stabilization, budget support, and humanitarian aid. In addition, conclusions and lessons learned are presented. This report covers expenditure area 7, international aid, and the period 2022–2025.
tldr: The text illustrates how Sweden's funds for international aid have been utilized in Ukraine, Moldova, and Armenia between the years 2022 and 2025. It explains the results achieved through this support.
lattlast:
This report provides a detailed overview of how Swedish development assistance has been working in Ukraine. It also examines the support provided to the countries of Moldova and Armenia. The report focuses on funds allocated within the area of expenditure 7, which is the portion of the national budget that governs international development assistance.

The work has focused on five key areas: helping to rebuild Ukrainian society, implementing important changes in the country's laws and regulations, ensuring security, supporting the country's economy, and providing emergency aid to those in need.

The period under examination is from 2022 to 2025. In addition to showing where the funds have been allocated, the report also describes the lessons learned from the work. The purpose is to understand what has worked well and what can be improved in the future.
